caption: A man with a shaved head, a full dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is seated in a room with dark, sound-absorbing acoustic foam panels on the wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone, mounted on a boom arm, is positioned directly in front of his face. The microphone's arm features the text "Audio-Technica AT2020". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone. In the initial moments, his right hand is raised near the side of his head in a blurred motion, which then moves out of the frame. His expression remains focused as he continues talking, with slight changes in his mouth and facial muscles as he speaks. The camera angle remains a steady close-up shot throughout the entire duration of the clip.
